CustomField.formula: IF( ISBLANK( Delivery_Post_Date__c ), NULL, IF( TODAY() - (Delivery_Post_Date__c + 2) <= 0 && ISPICKVAL(Delivery_Post_Status__c , 'C') , VALUE( TEXT(Order__r.Stock_Aging_Limit__c) ) , VALUE( TEXT(Order__r.Stock_Aging_Limit__c) )- (TODAY() - (Delivery_Post_Date__c + 2)) ) )
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Order's Stock Aging Limit - (TODAY - (Delivery Post Date + 2))
CustomField.label: Stock Aging Countdown(days)
